series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the full text of a proposed rule, amendment to a current rule, or rule to be rescinded; the public notice required under R.C. 119.03(A); the rule summary; and the fiscal analysis of the rule required under R.C. 127.18.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in Secretary of State office six (6) months. , storage five (5) years. , may . ; Electronic: Rules shall be maintained permanently amended or rescinded
